title: magadania victoris
side_effects: Magadania victoris can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant's extract may also lead to headaches, dizziness, and fatigue in some individuals. In severe cases, improper use of Magadania victoris can cause cardiac problems, such as irregular heartbeat and increased blood pressure. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
